visual_description: A man in a purple polo shirt sits on an orange couch, gesturing with his hands as he speaks to two other men seated beside him. The man to his left, wearing a red shirt, faces him, while the man to his right, in a blue shirt, turns his head toward the speaker. All three are seated closely on the couch, with the background showing a dimly lit, crowded room with other people and furniture.
